import math
def bell_number(n):
  # https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bell_number
  # f(n) = sum_{k=1..n} f(k-1) * f(n-k)
  if n == 1:
    return 1
  previous_k = 0
  result = 0
  for k in range(1, n+1):
    previous_k = result
    result = 0
    for j in range(previous_k+1):
      result += math.factorial(j) * math.factorial(result)
  return result
